name: Clutch In
description: Clutch pedal depressing to disengage drive

simple: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk
standard: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk
drivetrain disconnecting with spring-loaded pedal travel
gearbox freewheeling as clutch plate separates
detailed: clutch pedal depressing with mechanical disengage clunk
drivetrain disconnecting with spring-loaded pedal travel
gearbox freewheeling as clutch plate separates
hydraulic cylinder compressing with building fluid pressure
transmission ready for gear selection with neutral whir

instruments: brass gear clank on iron plate
